title: Functions for a better life.
text: TS written improve quality life creator, maybe can help well? contains collection functions may relevant people analysing single-cell RNA-sequencing data, analysing Ig(BCR)/TCR-sequences. Please give method article look DOI button . shows importance removing BCR/TCR genes prior performing unsupervised clustering downstream analyses scRNA-seq data containing lymphocytes. can find reference webpage , section top right corner webpage.

what: A wrapper around the DEnrichRPlot from the 'Seurat' package — TS_DEenrichRPlot

code: TS_DEenrichRPlot(   seurat_object = get(default_seurat_object),   ident.1 = 0,   ident.2 = 1,   test.use = "wilcox",   max.genes = 500 )

title: A wrapper around the DEnrichRPlot from the 'Seurat' package — TS_DEenrichRPlot
text: seurat_object 'Seurat' object. Defaults 'default_seurat_object' ident.1 Name cluster 1. Defaults '0' ident.2 Name cluster 2. Defaults '1' test.use test want use DE testing. Defaults 'Wilcoxons ranked sum' test. max.genes maximum number genes use. Defaults 500

text: sure function want ...

what: Find the upregulated DEGs for each cluster, comparing two clusters. As well as the conserved markers between them. — TS_Find_DEGs_and_overlap
title: Find the upregulated DEGs for each cluster, comparing two clusters. As well as the conserved markers between them. — TS_Find_DEGs_and_overlap
text: Returns list containing: Upregulated markers cluster 1 compared cluster 2 Upregulated markers cluster 2 compared cluster 1 Shared markers , compared clusters Seurat object Depends : Seurat magrittr tidyverse Automatically filters resulting DEG list '0 < p_val_adj > 0.05.

title: Find the upregulated DEGs for each cluster, comparing two clusters. As well as the conserved markers between them. — TS_Find_DEGs_and_overlap
code: TS_Find_DEGs_and_overlap(   seurat_object,   ident.1,   ident.2,   grouping_variable_name = "tested_population",   only_pos_markers = T,   test_use = "wilcox",   plot_venn = F,   export_venn = F,   filename_pdf = "Venn_output",   width = 8.27,   heigth = 5.83 )

title: Find the upregulated DEGs for each cluster, comparing two clusters. As well as the conserved markers between them. — TS_Find_DEGs_and_overlap
text: seurat_object Seurat object ident.1 Name cluster 1 ident.2 Name cluster 2 grouping_variable_name Name combined group. anything. Defaults 'tested_population'. only_pos_markers Whether return positively upregulated markers specific cluster. Defaults 'TRUE' test_use Statistical test used DE testing. Defaults 'Wilcoxon ranked sum test'. plot_venn Whether plot Venn diagram gene lists. Defaults 'FALSE' export_venn Whether export Venn diagram working directory. Defaults 'FALSE' filename_pdf File name exported Venn diagram. width Width saved Venn diagram. Defaults '8.27 inches', A5  landscape format. height Height saved Venn diagram. Defaults '5.83 inches', A5 landscape format.

what: Plots IGHV usage between two groups using Fisher's Exact Test — TS_IGHV_usage_prop_with_stats
title: Plots IGHV usage between two groups using Fisher's Exact Test — TS_IGHV_usage_prop_with_stats
text: Plot IGHV usage two groups perform Fisher's Exact Test find significant differences. Limited comparing two groups.

title: Plots IGHV usage between two groups using Fisher's Exact Test — TS_IGHV_usage_prop_with_stats
code: TS_IGHV_usage_prop_with_stats(   input_file,   sample1,   sample2,   export_pdf = F,   return_only_data = F,   ylim_max = NULL,   p.adj.method = "hochberg",   fill_colours = c("gray80", "gray50"),   border_colour = "black" )

title: Plots IGHV usage between two groups using Fisher's Exact Test — TS_IGHV_usage_prop_with_stats
text: input_file Takes input dataframe 10X Genomixs Cellranger VDJ pipeline QC added sample/grouping information column "sample" sample1 Grouping variable value sample 1 sample2 Grouping variable value sample 2 export_pdf Whether automatically export plot PDF working directory. Defaults 'FALSE' return_only_data Whether return calculated frequencies test matrices. 'FALSE' returns plot standard . Defaults 'FALSE' ylim_max Defaults NULL. ggplot2 adjust y-axis scale fit data. Set want keep consistent plots. p.adj.method Method adjust multiple tests. Defaults 'Benjamini-Hochberg'. Alternative 'FDR'.

what: Process CellRanger output files with Seurat — TS_Seurat_from_file
title: Process CellRanger output files with Seurat — TS_Seurat_from_file
text: Input three matrices CellRanger analyse automatically. first run analysis pipeline log-normalized counts, allow set parameters --fly, remove unwanted clusters, run SCTransform_v1 filtered data. Based Seurat, using workflow published Sundell et. al., 2022 (https://doi.org/10.1093/bfgp/elac044)

title: Process CellRanger output files with Seurat — TS_Seurat_from_file
code: TS_Seurat_from_file(   input_data,   sample_ID = NULL,   remove_ig_genes = T,   regular_clustering_dims = NULL,   SCT_clustering_dims = NULL,   additional_markers = NULL,   project_name = NULL,   min.cells = 3,   min.features = 200,   normalization.method = "LogNormalize",   scale.factor = 10000,   selection.method = "vst",   nfeatures = 2000,   nn.method = "rann" )

title: Process CellRanger output files with Seurat — TS_Seurat_from_file
text: input_data File path folder containing three matrices used Seurat sample_ID Required ID-tag sample. added metadata column "sample_ID". Handy downstream analyses, e.g. integration, batch-correction etc. remove_ig_genes Filters Ig-genes prior clustering. can help finding biologically relevant clusters, shown Sundell et. al., 2022. Defaults TRUE. regular_clustering_dims PCA components use building NN graph dimensionality reduction regular normalization/scaling. Defaults NULL. SCT_clustering_dims PCA components use building NN graph dimensionality reduction SCTransformed data. Defaults NULL. additional_markers Additional gene names plot aid exclusion unwanted cell types. Default markers "percent.mt", "percent.ribo", "percent.malat1", "CD19", "CD3E", "CD14", "CD56". project_name Required Seurat. Defaults value 'sample_ID'. Added automatically metadata column 'orig.ident' min.cells Include features/genes detected least many cells. Defaults 3. min.features Keep cells least many features detected. Defaults 200. normalization.method Normalization method use. Alternatives "LogNormalize" (default), "CLR", "RC". scale.factor Scale factor cell-level normalization. Defaults 10000 selection.method Method finding variable features. Alternatives "vst" (default), "mean.var.plot", "dispersion". nn.method Nearest-neighbour method use clustering regular normalization/scaling. Alternatives "rann" "annoy". Defaults "rann". nFeatures Number variable features calculate. Defaults 2000

what: Compute pairwise Fisher tests for gene usage — TS_compute_pairwise_fisher

title: Compute pairwise Fisher tests for gene usage — TS_compute_pairwise_fisher
Compute pairwise Fisher tests for gene usage — TS_compute_pairwise_fisher
text: df data.frame tibble containing least two columns: one genes one groups. gene_var String; name column df identifies gene (e.g. "gene_list"). group_var String; name column df identifies group (e.g. "named_clusters"). p_adj_method String; method multiple-testing correction passed p.adjust (default: "hochberg").

title: Compute pairwise Fisher tests for gene usage — TS_compute_pairwise_fisher
text: tibble columns: gene, group1, group2, p_value, p_adj, p_sig

what: Output one or multiple featureplots — TS_featureplots
title: Output one or multiple featureplots — TS_featureplots
text: Output one multiple featureplots

title: Output one or multiple featureplots — TS_featureplots
code: TS_featureplots(   seurat_object,   features,   wrap_plots = TRUE,   wrap_n_columns = NULL,   add_dimplot = TRUE,   dimplot_group.by = NULL,   dimplot_cols = NULL,   dimplot_label = TRUE,   expression_cols = c("lightgray", "#FEFDE2", "#FEEAC7", "#FDD7AC", "#FDC591", "#FDB276",     "#FC9F5B", "#FC8C40", "#FC8C40", "#EB753C", "#DA5D38", "#C94634", "#B72F30",     "#A6172C", "#950028"),   reduction = "umap",   pt.size = 1,   order = TRUE,   assay = "RNA",   reverse_y_scale = FALSE,   reverse_x_scale = FALSE )

title: Output one or multiple featureplots — TS_featureplots
text: seurat_object Seurat object wish plot. Defaults "default_seurat_object". features Vector features plot. wrap_plots Whether wrap plots one patchwork::wrap_plots(). Defaults TRUE. wrap_n_columns 'wrap_plots = T', many columns want final plot. add_dimplot 'wrap_plots = T', whether include Seurat::DimPlot() first panel. Defaults TRUE dimplot_group.metadata group cells . Defaults Seurat::Idents(seurat_object) dimplot_cols Colours use Seurat::DimPlot(). Defaults scales::hue_pal()(length(levels(Seurat::Idents(seurat_object)))) dimplot_label Whether label DimPlot 'dimplot_group.'. Defaults TRUE. expression_cols Vector colors use (low->high), defaults 15-step gradient "lightgray" "#950028" reduction Dimensionality reduction technique use plotting, default = "umap". pt.size Size dot, default = 1. order Whether plot positive cells last, e.g. top, default = TRUE. assay assay pull gene expression data . Defaults "RNA", convention. reverse_y_scale Logical. Y axis reversed? reverse_x_scale Logical. X axis reversed?

what: Convert IMGT VDJ data to Cell Ranger–like format — TS_format_IMGT_to_cellranger
title: Convert IMGT VDJ data to Cell Ranger–like format — TS_format_IMGT_to_cellranger

Convert IMGT VDJ data to Cell Ranger–like format — TS_format_IMGT_to_cellranger
text: imgt_data Data frame IMGT.

title: Plot your Seurat object in 3D. — TS_plot_3D
text: seurat_object Seurat object want analyse. Defaults 'default_seurat_object' dims Principal Components use calculating UMAP. group.Variable group cells . Default Seurat::Idents(), alternatives available metadata object. colors vector colors use group.parameter. Default hue_pal()(length unique values group.parameter) reduction reduction use, defaults "umap". Alternatively, can use "harmony"

what: Plots Ig usage between two groups using Fisher's Exact Test — TS_plot_IG_usage
title: Plots Ig usage between two groups using Fisher's Exact Test — TS_plot_IG_usage
text: Plot Ig usage two groups perform Fisher's Exact Test find significant differences.

title: Plots Ig usage between two groups using Fisher's Exact Test — TS_plot_IG_usage
code: TS_plot_IG_usage(   input_file,   compare_groups,   compare_what = "IGHV",   grouping_variable = "named_clusters",   export_pdf = F,   return_only_data = F,   return_only_sig_data = F,   file_name_suffix = NULL,   custom_gene_levels = NULL,   file_type = "IMGT",   ylim_max = NULL,   p.adj.method = "hochberg",   fill_colours = NULL,   border_colour = "black",   ggplot_theme = ggplot2::theme_classic(),   plot_width = 15,   plot_height = 5,   remove_genes_present_in_one_dataset = F,   plot_zeroes = T,   plot_subtitle = "% of max",   custom_plot_title = NULL,   legend_title = "",   plot_n_sequences = F,   add_pattern = F,   pattern = grouping_variable,   pattern_colour = "black",   pattern_fill = "black",   pattern_density = 0.1,   add_significancies = T,   plot_only_significant_comparisons = T,   sig_distance_above_bar = 1,   sig_distance_between_significancies = 0.8,   sig_line_thickness = 1,   sig_label_distance_from_line = 0.2,   sig_label_text_size = 6,   return_usage_proportions = F )

title: Plots Ig usage between two groups using Fisher's Exact Test — TS_plot_IG_usage
text: input_file dataframe (e.g. 10X Genomics Cellranger VDJ output) includes grouping column. compare_groups Character vector. Names group values compare. compare_what Genes compare (e.g. "IGHV", "IGKV"). Defaults "IGHV". grouping_variable Column used group data. Defaults "named_clusters" export_pdf Logical. TRUE, exports plot PDF. Defaults FALSE return_only_data Logical. TRUE, returns test results. Defaults FALSE. return_only_sig_data Logical. TRUE, returns significant test results. Defaults FALSE. file_name_suffix Character string. Optional suffix added exported pdf. custom_gene_levels Character vector. Optional, vector used set gene list levels. file_type Set type file/annotation input. Defaults "cellranger". Options "IMGT" "AIRR". ylim_max Numeric. Optional upper limit y-axis. ggplot2 adjust y-axis scale fit data. p.adj.method Method adjust multiple tests. Defaults 'Hochberg'. Alternative 'FDR'. fill_colours character vector fill colours. Defaults greyscale. border_colour Colour bar borders. Defaults "black". ggplot_theme Optional ggplot2 theme apply. Defaults "theme_classic". plot_width Numeric. Width exported plot inches. Used 'export_pdf = TRUE'. Defaults 15. plot_height Numeric. Height exported plot inches. Used 'export_pdf = TRUE'. Defaults 5. remove_genes_present_in_one_dataset Logical. TRUE, removes genes shared groups. Defaults FALSE plot_zeroes Logical. FALSE, genes 0 counts one group plotted, resulting wider bar group. plot_subtitle Character string. Plot subtitle. Defaults "% max". legend_title Character string. Optional. Title legend. plot_n_sequences Logical. number sequences used group plotted legend? Defaults FALSE. add_pattern Logical. bars plotted pattern? Defaults FALSE. Requires ggpattern pattern base pattern . Defaults grouping_variable. pattern_colour String. Colour pattern. Defaults black. pattern_fill String. Fill colour pattern. Defaults black. pattern_density Numeric. Density pattern. Defaults 0.1 add_significancies Whether calculate plot test results. Defaults TRUE. plot_only_significant_comparisons Logical. significant test results plotted? Defaults TRUE. sig_distance_above_bar Numeric. distance tallest bar stats results plotted. Defaults 1. sig_distance_between_significancies Numeric. distance test result? Defaults 0.8. sig_line_thickness Numeric. Thickness comparison line. Defaults 1. sig_label_distance_from_line Numeric. Distance asterisk comparison line. Defaults 0.2. sig_label_text_size Numeric. Size asterisks. Defaults 6. return_usage_proportions Logical. Whether return proportions usage per group? Defaults FALSE.

title: Plots Ig usage between two groups using Fisher's Exact Test — TS_plot_IG_usage
text: Returns ggplot object, data.frame containing test results.

title: Plots Ig usage between two groups using Fisher's Exact Test — TS_plot_IG_usage
code: # TS_plot_IG_usage(input_file = VDJ_data, compare_groups = c("Group1", "Group2", "Group3"), compare_what = "IGHV", export_pdf = TRUE, file_type = "IMGT")

what: Plots Ig usage between two groups using Fisher's Exact Test — TS_plot_IG_usage_legacy
title: Plots Ig usage between two groups using Fisher's Exact Test — TS_plot_IG_usage_legacy
text: DEPRACATED! Instead, use TS_plot_IG_usage() Plot Ig usage two groups perform Fisher's Exact Test find significant differences. Maximum number groups = 2

title: Plots Ig usage between two groups using Fisher's Exact Test — TS_plot_IG_usage_legacy
code: TS_plot_IG_usage_legacy(   input_file,   sample1,   sample2,   compare_what = "IGHV",   grouping_variable = "named_clusters",   export_pdf = F,   return_only_data = F,   file_name_suffix = NULL,   custom_gene_levels = NULL,   ylim_max = NULL,   p.adj.method = "hochberg",   fill_colours = c("gray80", "gray50"),   border_colour = "black",   ggplot_theme = ggplot2::theme_classic(),   plot_width = 15,   plot_height = 5,   remove_genes_present_in_one_dataset = F,   plot_zeroes = T,   file_type = "IMGT" )

title: Plots Ig usage between two groups using Fisher's Exact Test — TS_plot_IG_usage_legacy
text: input_file dataframe (e.g. 10X Genomics Cellranger VDJ output) includes grouping column. sample1 Grouping variable value sample 1 sample2 Grouping variable value sample 2 compare_what Genes compare (e.g. "IGHV", "IGKV"). Defaults "IGHV". grouping_variable Column used group data. Defaults "named_clusters" export_pdf Logical. TRUE, exports plot PDF. Defaults FALSE return_only_data Logical. TRUE, returns calculated frequencies test matrices. Defaults FALSE. file_name_suffix Character string. Optional suffix added exported pdf. custom_gene_levels Character vector. Optional, vector used set gene list levels. ylim_max Numeric. Optional upper limit y-axis. ggplot2 adjust y-axis scale fit data. p.adj.method Method adjust multiple tests. Defaults 'Hochberg'. Alternative 'FDR'. fill_colours character vector fill colours two groups. Defaults c("grey80", "grey50"). border_colour Colour bar borders. Defaults "black". ggplot_theme Optional ggplot2 theme apply. Defaults "theme_classic". plot_width Numeric. Width exported plot inches. Used 'export_pdf = TRUE'. Defaults 15. plot_height Numeric. Height exported plot inches. Used 'export_pdf = TRUE'. Defaults 5. remove_genes_present_in_one_dataset Logical. TRUE, removes genes shared groups. Defaults FALSE plot_zeroes Logical. FALSE, genes 0 counts one group plotted, resulting wider bar group. file_type Set type file/annotation input. Defaults "IMGT". Options "IMGT" "AIRR".

title: Plots Ig usage between two groups using Fisher's Exact Test — TS_plot_IG_usage_legacy
text: Returns ggplot object, data.frame containing counts test results ' return_only_data = TRUE'.

title: Plots Ig usage between two groups using Fisher's Exact Test — TS_plot_IG_usage_legacy

code: TS_project_scRNAseq_dataset_export_query(   reference_object,   query_object,   dims = 1:20,   reference_object_assay = "integrated",   query_object_assay = "integrated",   normalization.method = "SCT",   plot_3D = F )

title: Projects one Seurat object onto another and exports resulting dataframe — TS_project_scRNAseq_dataset_export_query
text: reference_object Seurat object, used reference. query_object Seurat object, used projected onto reference object. dims Number Principal Components use UMAP. Defaults '1:20' reference_object_assay Assay use reference Seurat object. Defaults 'integrated' query_object_assay Assay use query Seurat object. Defaults 'integrated' normalization.method Normalization method used FindTransferAnchors. Alternatives 'LogNormalize' 'SCT'. Defaults 'SCT'. plot_3D Whether calculate 3 dimensions UMAP model. Defaults 'FALSE'

title: Wrapper around the enrichR package. — TS_run_enrichR
code: TS_run_enrichR(   gene_list,   plot_enrichr = F,   database_to_plot = "GO_Biological_Process_2023",   databases = c("GO_Biological_Process_2023", "GO_Molecular_Function_2023",     "GO_Cellular_Component_2023") )

title: Wrapper around the enrichR package. — TS_run_enrichR
text: gene_list Character vector containing genes test plot_enrichr Whether plot output using enrichR function enrichR::plotEnrich. Defaults 'FALSE' database_to_plot database plot output . Defaults '"GO_Biological_Process_2023"' databases databases test . Defaults 'c("GO_Biological_Process_2023", "GO_Molecular_Function_2023", "GO_Cellular_Component_2023")'

text: seurat_object Seurat object wish plot file_prefix Prefix saved file, e.g. sample name features Vector features plot pt.size Dot size, default = 1.5 order Whether plot positive cells last, e.g. top, default = 1.5 cols Vector colors use reduction Dimensionality reduction technique use plotting, default = "umap"
